summary: Tested BidBlitz Pay new features (P2P Transfer, Cashback, scan-customer GET) and Partner Marketing translations. Backend: 14/14 tests PASSED. Frontend: All translations working correctly in German.

backend_tests.test_scan_customer_post_not_allowed: PASS - POST returns 405 Method Not Allowed

partner_marketing_translations.referralBonus: PASS - 'Erhalte €10 für jeden geworbenen Partner!' displayed
partner_marketing_translations.socialSharing_tab: PASS - 'Social Media' tab visible and clickable
partner_marketing_translations.no_raw_keys: PASS - No raw translation keys visible (referral:, qrCodes:, etc.)

bidblitz_pay_send_tab.send_tab_visible: PASS - 'Senden' tab visible in BidBlitz Pay navigation

partner_marketing_translations.description: Partner Marketing section now shows German translations correctly. PartnerPortal.js uses centralized partnerTranslations.js which includes: referral, yourReferralCode, referralBonus, qrCodes, printTip, socialSharing, shareNow

scan_customer_get_method.description: /api/bidblitz-pay/scan-customer is now GET method (was POST). Returns 400 for invalid QR, 405 for POST requests

p2p_transfer.description: POST /api/bidblitz-pay/send-money endpoint working. Validates: amount > 0, minimum €1, recipient exists, not self-transfer, sufficient balance

transfer_history.description: GET /api/bidblitz-pay/transfer-history returns sent and received transfers with totals

cashback_system.description: GET /api/bidblitz-pay/cashback-balance and POST /api/bidblitz-pay/redeem-cashback working. Minimum €5 required for redemption

send_tab_ui.description: New 'Senden' tab in BidBlitz Pay UI with form for recipient email, amount, message. All data-testid attributes present

biometric_auth_error_handling.description: BiometricAuth.js now handles errors: NotAllowedError, SecurityError, NotSupportedError, InvalidStateError, AbortError with German messages

critical_code_review_comments: Partner Marketing translations properly integrated via partnerTranslations.js import in PartnerPortal.js (line 39)
Translation function t() correctly checks partnerTranslations first, then inline translations (line 1206)
scan-customer endpoint changed from POST to GET with qr_data as query parameter
P2P Transfer validates minimum €1, blocks self-transfer, checks balance before transfer
BiometricAuth.js error handling improved with specific error messages for different WebAuthn errors
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: BidBlitz Pay new features fully tested. P2P Transfer (send-money), Transfer History, Cashback System all working. scan-customer is now GET method. Partner Marketing translations fixed - uses centralized partnerTranslations.js. BiometricAuth error handling improved. Test credentials: admin@bidblitz.ae / Admin123!, wise-test@partner.com / Test123!
